title: Possibility of providing separate credentials for logging in to Hyper-v virtual machine
author: Wolvverine
body_snippet:
It would be useful to add the possibility of providing separate credentials for logging in to Hyper-v virtual machines.

Currently it is possible to give credentials only for Hyper-v server - there is no possibility to give separate credentials for logging in to the virtual machine itself if they are different for the RDP session than for the Hyper-v server.

mRemoteNG - v1.77.3
local Hyper-v Server
Hyper-v VM - example: https://app.vagrantup.com/wolvverine/LinuxMintCinnamon (linux with XR...

iterations.description: Wontfix: Hyper-V VM credentials field requires schema extension and protocol-specific connection logic

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: in next version its a plan to implement connection profiles so that should give you required flexibility

notes: Feature: separate Hyper-V VM credentials. 6 failed AI attempts. Requires protocol-specific credential handling.
